name: paper-figures — Chaos (AIP) manuscript Figures 1 & 7
provenance: Composes existing merged work: traced runs from the absorption re-campaign (absorption_results/) and the reduced-ODE bifurcation machinery (tools/reduced-ode/). New code only; all prior *_results/ dirs are read-only; deterministic; every artifact regenerable from this config.

style._note: Shared rcParams live in style.py; the palette here is the single source of truth so both figures (and any future ones) draw from one colorblind-safe set (Okabe-Ito / Wong, Nat. Methods 2011).

fig1._note: Annotated example trace. Selection is deterministic (CP0): N=16, A=0.5, 1-2 recovered grazes before absorption, uncensored, span<=300s, scored for visual clarity (deep recovery dip, separation, visible breathing). The resolved choice is pinned here for reproducibility; cp0_select.py re-derives and asserts it.
fig1._horizon_note: Integrate past t_abs + T_v so the absorption label CONFIRMS (not censored), matching the campaign labeler; the plot crops to the event window.

supervisor._note: Shipped collapse detector (chimera.ts / chimeraVoice.ts): alive iff max(R1,R2)>SYNC_HI and min(R1,R2)<INCOH_LO; a firing = not-alive sustained >= COLLAPSE_HOLD_S.

fig7._note: (beta, A) stability diagram, Abrams-2008-Fig.4 style, rendered from our own reduced-ODE machinery. SN/Hopf from Eqs 17/18 (series) checked against numeric locators; homoclinic by the existing bisection.

homoclinic._note: Adaptive bracket per beta: lower = just above the Hopf series (breathing cycle exists), upper scanned up to A_hi_cap until escape-to-sync; then the reduced_core bisection. bisect_tol/t_max/sync_r reuse reduced.config.json.
